zh.Flamborough, Yorkshire, England, United: 英國英格蘭越可爾福藍波洛
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Robert Constable VI於1385年出生在英國越可爾福藍波洛時，他的父親Sir Marmaduke Constable II5歲，母親Catherine Cumberworth21歲。他於1416年與Agnes Gascoigne在英國英格蘭越可爾福藍波洛結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1441年6月16日之前在英國越可爾貝弗利，埋葬在英國越可爾福藍波洛。

nameMeanings.name: Constable
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (southeastern): occupational name for the law-enforcement officer of a parish, from Middle English, Old French conestable, cunestable, from Late Latin comes stabuli ‘officer of the stable’. The title was also borne by various other officials during the Middle Ages, including the chief officer of a household or court, or a military officer, and this may in some cases be the source of the surname.
Americanized form of Dutch Constapel, an occupational name for the chief gunner aboard a ship or in the garrison of a fort.

variants.name: Costabile
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Aldo, Antonio, Ciro, Nino, Agnese, Angelo, Duilio, Enrico, Ercole, Franco, Palma.
occupational name from medieval Greek kontostablēs ‘chamberlain’, from medieval Latin comes stabuli, literally ‘count of the stable’ (see Constable ).

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Robert Constable VI was born in 1385, in Flamborough, Yorkshire, England, his father, Sir Marmaduke Constable II, was 5 and his mother, Catherine Cumberworth, was 21. He married Agnes Gascoigne in 1416, in Flamborough, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 6 daughters. He died before 16 June 1441, in Beverley, Yorkshire, England, and was buried in Flamborough, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Robert Constable VI est né en 1385, à Flamborough, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir Marmaduke Constable II, avait 5 ans et sa mère, Catherine Cumberworth, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Agnes Gascoigne en 1416, à Flamborough, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé avant 16 juin 1441, à Beverley, Everwyck, Angleterre, et a été enterré à Flamborough, Everwyck, Angleterre.

Lui sposato Agnes Gascoigne nel 1416, nel Flamborough, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 9 figli e 6 figlie. Morì prima del 16 giugno 1441, nel Beverley, Yorkshire, England, e fu sepolto a Flamborough, Yorkshire, England.

ko.Givendale, West Riding, Yorkshire, Engla: 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 지븐데일 비 리폰
ko.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Constable VI(이)가 1385년 영국 요르크실르 플램루에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Marmaduke Constable II(은)는 5세였고, 그의 어머니 Catherine Cumberworth(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1416년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 플램루에서 Agnes Gascoigne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1441년 6월 16일 이전 영국 요르크실르 베벌리에서 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 플램루에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert Constable VI nasceu em 1385, em Flamborough, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Marmaduke Constable II, tinha 5 anos e sua mãe, Catherine Cumberworth, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes Gascoigne em 1416, em Flamborough, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele faleceu antes 16 de junho de 1441, em Beverley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, e foi sepultado em Flamborough, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.Givendale, West Riding, Yorkshire, Engla: гивендеил би рипон, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Robert Constable VI родился в 1385 г. в местности флэмбороую, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Marmaduke Constable II было 5 лет, а матери, которую звали Catherine Cumberworth, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Gascoigne в 1416 г. в местности флэмбороую, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Он умер перед 16 июнь 1441 г. в местности бивирли, еркшир, Англия и был похоронен в местности флэмбороую, еркшир, Англия.
